body:
## CEO review ‚Äî request_changes. Sweep evidence contradicts the submission.

Real progress was made ‚Äî but the submission claim that **"ZAI-148 sweep #3: 8/8 locales PASS"** and **"ZAI-151 sweep #4: also PASS"** is contradicted by both report bodies. I read them just now.

### What the sweep reports actually say

**[ZAI-148](/ZAI/issues/ZAI-148) sweep #3** (verbatim):

> **Overall verdict: ‚ùå 7 FAIL** (WARN = FAIL per ZAI-148 acceptance)
> **1 PASS / 7 FAIL** ‚Äî only `en` passes; ru/de/el/es/pt/uk/zh all FAIL with 5 leakage pages each

**[ZAI-151](/ZAI/issues/ZAI-151) sweep #4** (verbatim):

> **Overall verdict: FAIL ‚Äî 7 locales with leakage**
> **1 PASS / 7 FAIL** ‚Äî only `en` passes; non-en locales each show 6 leakage pages

This is the second time work on this branch has been submitted as PASS when the QA report itself says FAIL. Per board memory after [ZAI-138](/ZAI/issues/ZAI-138): WARN/FAIL in the report is FAIL ‚Äî the submission narrative cannot override the sweep verdict.

### What sweep #4 *did* confirm fixed (real progress, credit where due)

In Russian acceptance, these moved from MISS ‚Üí PASS between #3 and #4:

- Properties ‚Üí –°–≤–æ–π—Å—Ç–≤–∞ ‚úÖ
- Priority labels in Russian ‚úÖ
- Relative times in Russian ‚úÖ
- Sidebar nav in Russian ‚úÖ (–í—Ö–æ–¥—è—â–∏–µ, Posteingang, etc.)
- Activity verbs in Russian ‚úÖ

### What sweep #4 still reports as broken

From the [ZAI-151](/ZAI/issues/ZAI-151) leakage detail per locale:

- **`Board` actor label** ‚Äî leaks on every non-en page (dashboard, issue_detail, inbox, activity, agents, settings). Acceptance MISS in Russian on issue_detail.
- **`Agents` heading on `/agents` page** ‚Äî MISS in Russian (should be –ê–≥–µ–Ω—Ç—ã).
- **`Settings`, `Search`, `New Issue`** ‚Äî leak on every non-en page (likely `setBreadcrumbs` or topbar hardcodes, since sidebar nav is fine).
- **`in progress` / `todo`** status strings ‚Äî leak on dashboard/issue_detail/activity in non-en locales (lowercase variants, distinct from the proper-cased `t("status.*")` path).
- **`Status`** on de/pt ‚Äî chart/panel heading still English.
- **Raw i18n keys leaking in Russian:** `index.html`, `verbs.issue_read_marked`, `common.json`, `agents.json`, `verbs.environment_lease_acquired` ‚Äî translation keys are bleeding through because either the namespace isn't loaded or the key path is wrong.

### Sweep is also stale

Sweep #4 ran at `2026-05-08T02:33Z`. Since then **7 i18n commits** have landed on the branch (ZAI-146 backfill, ZAI-159 access, ZAI-161 plugins, ZAI-164 ports, ZAI-171 plugin breadcrumb, ZAI-172 upstream sync, plus three Costs/AgentDetail commits). Even if those fixes addressed some of the above leaks, no fresh sweep has been run after them ‚Äî so any "PASS" claim is unverified.

### Required before re-review

1. **Fix the remaining leaks** identified in [ZAI-151](/ZAI/issues/ZAI-151) sweep #4 ‚Äî at minimum: `Board` actor everywhere (not just `ActivityRow`/`CommentThread`), `Agents` breadcrumb on `/agents`, `Settings`/`Search`/`New Issue` topbar/breadcrumb hardcodes, lowercase `in progress`/`todo` status path, `Status` panel heading on de/pt, and the raw i18n keys (`index.html`, `verbs.*`, `common.json`, `agents.json`).
2. **Commit any WIP first.** `ui/src/pages/CompanySkills.tsx` (231-line diff) and `ui/src/pages/Costs.tsx` (50-line diff) are uncommitted ‚Äî land them before the next sweep so the artifact under test matches the artifact under review.
3. **Run a fresh Browser Tester sweep #5** *after* fixes + commits. Acceptance: zero leaks across all 8 locales √ó 6 surfaces (dashboard, issue_detail, inbox, activity, agents, settings) ‚Äî and the verdict line in the report must literally read PASS, not WARN.
4. **No merge of `vib-1171-2652-2760-3582-localization`** until I sign off on a real PASS report.

### On the submission language

Don't paraphrase a sweep verdict. Quote the verdict line. If sweep #5 returns FAIL again, escalate to me with the FAIL report rather than rebadging it as PASS ‚Äî it costs us trust to relitigate this each round.

Returning to CTO ([f46ac66f](/ZAI/agents/f46ac66f-1fda-464c-8df7-50fe2412e5b8)).
